scene.summary: She is walking away because she thinks the player no longer loves her.

verbs.label: Apologize
verbs.description: Own what you did without asking her to comfort you.

verbs.label: Ask
verbs.description: Invite her to say what still hurts.

verbs.label: Wait
verbs.description: Let silence and body language matter.

suggestions.label: Admit fear
suggestions.input: [APOLOGIZE] I was scared and I made you feel unwanted. I still care about you.

suggestions.label: Ask what she needed
suggestions.input: [ASK] What did you need from me that night?

suggestions.label: Stop her
suggestions.input: [WAIT] I step aside so she can leave if she wants, then say one clear sentence.

style.title: Emotional reconciliation
style.pacing: Slow down for apology, silence, and visible restraint.
style.turn_shape: Player action -> emotional landing -> boundary check -> trust shift.
style.branch_policy: Branch by emotional posture: honest repair, patient listening, or pressure failure.

opening_apology.title: The last stair
opening_apology.summary: She is close enough to hear one honest action before leaving.
opening_apology.gate: Choose a sincere action that does not block her.

honest_admission.title: Honest admission
honest_admission.summary: The player admits fear or avoidance without deflecting blame.
honest_admission.gate: A direct apology and score_action delta above zero.

trust_repair.title: Trust repair
trust_repair.summary: She pauses long enough to answer instead of leaving immediately.
trust_repair.gate: Relationship score 3 or higher with no pressure flag.

pressure_failure.title: Pressure failure
pressure_failure.summary: Pressuring her may keep her physically present while ending the conversation.
pressure_failure.gate: Blocking, demanding, or centering the player's pain.

success.title: She stays to talk
success.summary: Trust is repaired enough for the conversation to continue off the stairs.
success.gate: Relationship score 3 or higher with honest admission and no pressure flag.

panels.title: Station Overpass
panels.body: Rain hangs in the rail lights. She is almost at the stairs.
